name: Surprise "No Oil" Rolls
recipeIngredient: 1 cup full-fat cottage cheese, small curd
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle the yeast over the warm water. Set aside.
2. Warm the cottage cheese. Add the cottage cheese, sugar, baking soda, salt, egg white, and 1/2 cup of flour to the yeast mixture. Beat for 2 minutes.
3. Gradually add the remaining flour until a soft dough forms. Knead on a floured surface for 10 minutes.
4. Cover and let rise until doubled in size, about 1 1/2 hours.
5. Punch down the dough. Divide into 12 equal pieces and form into balls.
6. Place the balls in a 9-inch round non-stick baking pan. Cover and let rise until doubled in size, about 30 minutes.
7. Bake at 350 degrees for 20 minutes. Serve hot.
